name: Boozeless Julep
recipeIngredient: 1 ¼ ounces pure lime juice concentrate
¾ cup creme de menthe topping
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and water and stir thoroughly until the sugar dissolves completely.
2. Add the lime juice, lemonade concentrates, and creme de menthe topping to the mixture in the saucepan.
3. Bring the mixture to just below the boiling point, then remove from heat.
4. Allow the mixture to cool before chilling it.
5. To serve, mix 5 parts water with 1 part syrup.
Available at most gourmet grocers
